---
name: scrum-create-architecture-docs
description: "Scrum Workflow: Generate comprehensive architecture documentation (backend, frontend, DevOps, local dev environment, testing) by analyzing system structure. Use when the user says 'create architecture docs', 'generate system architecture', or '/scrum-create-architecture-docs'."
---

Load and execute the framework command at `scrum_workflow/commands/create-architecture-docs.md`.

The command file contains the full workflow orchestration including:
- Architect-doc agent spawning for architecture analysis
- Full-scan and incremental update modes
- Backend, frontend, DevOps, local dev, and testing architecture documentation
- Scan state tracking for incremental updates
